description: An accounts payable clerk needs to process an invoice from the electrical subcontractor.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the invoice and the corresponding subcontract agreement.

expected_outcome.expected: The invoice from 'Sparky Electric' and their subcontract are retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the work described in the invoice ('First floor wiring') matches the completed tasks in the daily logs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the work has been completed and approved by the site superintendent.
The invoice is marked as 'Approved' in the accounting system.
